errors.not_found_message: Shafin da kika nema bai wanzu ba ko janyewa.
errors.unauthorized: Ba a ba ka izini na samun shafi
errors.network_error: Kuskuren sadarwa. Bada jiya habar ku.
errors.validation_error: Bada jiya aikin ku kuma gwada sake.

acceptance.heading: 1. Karbawar Sharadi
acceptance.content: Ta hanyar shiga gida ka kulawar Katsina Online Business (KOB) yayin amfani, kana yarda kana kulawar sharadun wadata.

responsibilities.heading: 2. Albarkatun Mai Amfani
items: Ke da karfi na tsare alamar asusun ka
Yin alkarari na karbawar duk abin da ke faru
Samar da gaskiya gabaɗaya lokacin zabe
Ka yarda ba da hanya mara-haram don amfani

product_listings.heading: 3. Kayan Sayarwa da Tallace
items: Bayyana kayan da suke sanyi gaskiya
Tabbatar kayan sun cika yadda doka ta damka
Samar da cikakken bayanai na jigilar kaya
Juriya da mayar jiya ga sayan

prohibited.heading: 4. Ayyukan da ba za a yi
items: Amfani da kayan sadarwa don shigar da kasar

liability.heading: 5. Iyaka na Albarkatun
liability.content: KOB ana samun 'KAMAR NE' da 'AKWAI'. Ba mu da tabbatarwa. Ba za mu yi nauyi na duk sakaci na karya ba.

dispute_resolution.heading: 6. Warkar Jiya
dispute_resolution.content: Duk sakaci da ke fito daga amfani za a warke ta jiya a kan ma'aiki ko masa'ilaci.

changes.heading: 7. Canja wa Sharadi
changes.content: Mu da karfi na canja wa sharadi a kowane lokaci. Sauye zai aiki nan da nan.

contact.heading: 8. Tuntubo Mu
contact.content: Don tambayoyi game da sharadin nan, tuntubo mu a:

privacy.title: Sirin Jama'a
privacy.intro: KOB ke da buƙa na tsare asiri na jama'a. Wadata nan ta bayyana yadda muke tara, amfani, da tsare alama.

collection.heading: 1. Alama da muke tara
collection.intro: Muke tara alama da kake samar da kai tsaye:
items: Bayanai na asusun (suna, imel, wayar, adreshi)

usage.heading: 2. Yadda muke amfani
items: Samar da abubuwan da muke aiki

protection.heading: 3. Tsare Alama
protection.content: Muke amfani da tsarewa gida don tsare alama. Ko ta haka, babu neman 100% tsare.

sharing.heading: 4. Raba Alama
sharing.content: Ba mu sayar da alama ga waje. Amma za mu raba da masu taimakonin amfani.

retention.heading: 5. Adana Alama
retention.content: Muke adana alama domin kun aiki. Za ka iya neman gogewa anytime.

rights.heading: 6. Haƙƙinsa
rights.content: Ka da haƙƙin samun, sabunta, ko gida alama. Kuma za ka iya soke labari.

cookies.heading: 7. Cookies
cookies.content: Muke amfani da cookies don kyauta. Za ka iya canja sa browser.

contact.heading: 8. Tuntubo Mu
contact.content: Don tambayoyi game da sirin jama'a, tuntubo mu a:

faq.title: Tambayoyi da aka buƙata
faq.subtitle: Nemo amsa ga tambayoyi game da KOB

items.question: Ina zan ƙirƙira asusun?
items.answer: Bugi buttona da za a yi zabe. Za ka karɓa imel na tabbatar.

items.question: Ina zan sayar da kaya?
items.answer: Tafi ga dashboard da bugi 'Ƙara Kaya'. Cika bayanan, ɗora hotuna, kuma saita farashin.

items.question: Akwai biyan sayarwa?
items.answer: Aika mai sayarwa shine kyauta. Duba shiryin tabbatacciyar mai sayarwa.

items.question: Yadda amfani na biyan kuɗi?
items.answer: Muke amfani da tsarewa gida. Duk abubuwa da su amfani ba dole ba sa bayar.

items.question: Za ni iya canja sayarwa?
items.answer: Ah! Kana iya canja ko gida a anytime. Canja za ayi nan da nan.

items.question: Meye idan akwai matsala?
items.answer: Tuntubo mai sayarwa ko taimakonin. Muna aiki Jiya-Juma, 9AM-6PM WAT.

items.question: Nawa lokaci jigilar kaya?
items.answer: Lokaci ya dogara ga abubuwan. Sauran Katsina gida 2-3 aiki.

items.question: Meye idan kaya ta kashe?
items.answer: Bayya sakacinwa a jiya. Za mu taimakonka ko bayar kuɗi.

productFilter.title: Taƙaitawa Kaya
productFilter.tip: 💡 Haɗa taƙaitawa don gano abin da kika nema

productList.noProductsMessage: Babu kaya da ta dace. Gwada canja taƙaitawa.
productList.errorLoadingMessage: Ba na samun kaya. Gwada sake.

productForm.title: Nuni Kaya
productForm.confirmDelete: Ka tabbata? Ba za a iya comewa ba.
